title: phrissocarpus rigidus
intro: Phrissocarpus rigidus, a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa, is also known as the "African coral tree" due to its bright red or pink flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phrissocarpus rigidus include treating wounds, skin infections, and reducing fever, as well as being used to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Phrissocarpus rigidus include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or by mixing the plant's extracts with oils and waxes.
